heading: Donations of land for park purposes near or adjacent to National Forest Reserve in North Carolina
label: 453 Donations of land for park purposes near or adjacent to National Forest Reserve in North Carolina
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to accept for park purposes any lands and rights-of-way, including the Grandfather Mountain, near or adjacent to the Government national forest in western North Carolina.
notes: Codification“Government national forest” substituted in text for “Government forest reserve” on authority of , , which provided that forest reserves shall hereafter be known as national forests.act Mar. 4, 1907, ch. 290734 Stat. 1269
amendments: Codification“Government national forest” substituted in text for “Government forest reserve” on authority of , , which provided that forest reserves shall hereafter be known as national forests.act Mar. 4, 1907, ch. 290734 Stat. 1269
